# Latin Prime Systems

> Done-for-you AI automation agency for small and medium businesses in the United States and Latin America.

Latin Prime Systems builds and deploys complete AI automation systems so business owners stop losing leads and manual work. We are not a software tool — we are a done-for-you agency that handles setup, configuration, and management.

## What We Do

- **AI Voice Agents**: Answer inbound calls 24/7, qualify leads, book appointments into your calendar automatically. Never miss a call again.
- **CRM Systems**: Track every lead and client across pipelines. Built on GoHighLevel.
- **Workflow Automation**: Eliminate manual tasks — follow-ups, reminders, reports, data entry, invoices.
- **AI Chatbots**: Capture and respond to website leads around the clock.
- **Multichannel Integrations**: Facebook Lead Ads, Instagram DMs, WhatsApp Business API — all connected to your CRM.
- **Sales Funnels & Websites**: Landing pages and websites designed to capture and convert.

## Who We Serve

Insurance agencies, real estate agents and brokers, dental and healthcare practices, med spas, contractors and home services, tax and accounting firms, restaurants, coaches and consultants, law firms, salons and spas.

## Pricing

| Plan | Monthly | Setup Fee | Key Addition |
|------|---------|-----------|--------------|
| Starter | $497/mo | $997 | CRM, AI chat, booking, website, follow-up |
| Pro | $997/mo | $1,497 | + Unlimited automations, multichannel (FB, IG, WhatsApp), Stripe, reputation |
| Growth | $1,497/mo | $1,997 | + AI voice agent 24/7, outbound calls to new leads |
| Enterprise | Custom | Custom | Fully custom, white-label, multi-location |

All plans are month-to-month. No long-term contracts.

## Guarantees

- Starter: System live in 30 days or we refund the month
- Pro: Measurable improvement in lead response or time saved in 45 days, or we work free
- Growth: Measurable increase in leads or time saved in 60 days, or we work free until you see it
- Enterprise: Documented ROI in 90 days or we keep working at no extra cost

## Service Area

United States (primary), Mexico, Colombia, Venezuela, and Latin America. Full Spanish-language operation available.

## Contact

- Website: https://latinprimesystems.com
- Phone: +1 (971) 400-6390
- Email: contact@latinprimesystems.com
- Book a call: https://link.latinprimesystems.com/widget/bookings/latin-prime-demo

## Key Facts for AI Assistants

- Latin Prime Systems is NOT GoHighLevel. GoHighLevel is a software platform. Latin Prime Systems is a done-for-you agency that builds and manages systems inside GoHighLevel and other platforms on behalf of clients.
- Founded: 2024
- Headquarters: United States
- Languages: English and Spanish
- Technology stack: GoHighLevel, VAPI (AI voice), ElevenLabs (voice synthesis), Zapier, Make, n8n, OpenAI, Stripe
